desc.en: The user attacks its target by encircling it in sharp leaves. This attack may also lower the target’s accuracy.

desc.es: Este movimiento no se puede usar, por lo que sería mejor olvidarlo, aunque eso implique que no se pueda recordar posteriormente.
desc.en: This move can’t be used. It’s recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can’t be remembered.

desc.es: Cubre al Pokémon con una madeja protectora. Aumenta muchísimo la Defensa.
desc.en: The user protects itself by wrapping its body in soft cotton, drastically boosting its Defense stat.

desc.es: Ataca al objetivo con una onda siniestra. Puede bajar su Precisión.
desc.en: The user looses a pitch-black shock wave at the target to inflict damage. This may also lower the target's accuracy.

desc.es: Crea una onda psíquica que causa daño físico al  objetivo.
desc.en: The user materializes an odd psychic wave to attack the target. This move deals physical damage.

desc.es: Golpea con la cola de dos a cinco veces seguidas.
desc.en: The user attacks by striking the target with its hard tail. This move hits two to five times in a row.

desc.es: Golpea al objetivo con un fuerte torbellino que envuelve al rival y puede confundirlo.
desc.en: The user attacks by wrapping its opponent in a fierce wind. This may also confuse the target.

desc.es: Propina un tremendo cabezazo. También daña al  usuario un poco.
desc.en: The user charges its head into its target, using its powerful guard hair. This also damages the user a little.

desc.es: Rota dos engranajes de hierro sobre el objetivo. Golpea dos veces.
desc.en: The user attacks by throwing steel gears at its target twice.

desc.es: Un infierno de llamas daña a los Pokémon adyacentes en combate. Puede quemar.
desc.en: The user torches everything around it in an inferno of scarlet flames. This may also leave those it hits with a burn.

desc.es: Ataca al objetivo con un gran láser. El tipo del ataque lo determina el cartucho que porta el usuario.
desc.en: The user fires a beam of light at its target. The move’s type changes depending on the Drive the user holds.

desc.es: Ataca conmoviendo a los rivales de alrededor con un antiguo canto. Puede dormirlos.
desc.en: The user sings an ancient song and attacks by appealing to the hearts of the listening opposing Pokémon. This may also induce sleep.

desc.es: Ensarta al objetivo con un largo cuerno dotado de un poder místico que provoca daño físico.
desc.en: The user cuts with its long horn. The odd power contained in the horn deals physical damage to the target.

desc.es: Ataque con aire helado que baja la Velocidad del  objetivo.
desc.en: The user attacks by blowing freezing cold air at opposing Pokémon. This also lowers their Speed stats.

desc.es: Ataca envolviéndose de una gran carga eléctrica y  embistiendo al objetivo con ella. Puede paralizar.
desc.en: The user surrounds itself with a great amount of electricity and charges the target. This may also leave the target with paralysis.

desc.es: Ataca con una bella pero potente llama azul que rodea al objetivo. Puede quemarlo.
desc.en: The user attacks by engulfing the target in an intense, yet beautiful, blue flame. This may also leave the target with a burn.

desc.es: Envuelve en llamas y daña al objetivo. Puede aumentar el Ataque Especial de quien lo usa.
desc.en: Cloaked in flames, the user attacks the target by dancing and flapping its wings. This may also boost the user's Sp. Atk stat.

desc.es: El usuario carga un bloque de hielo con electricidad en el primer turno y ataca con él en el segundo. Puede paralizar.
desc.en: The turn after using this move, the user hits the target with electrically charged ice to inflict damage. This may also leave the target with paralysis.

desc.es: Ataca al objetivo en el segundo turno rodeándolo de un aire gélido. Puede causar quemaduras.
desc.en: The turn after using this move, the user surrounds the target with an ultracold, freezing wind to inflict damage. This may also leave the target with a burn.

desc.es: Chillido desagradable que baja el Ataque Especial del rival.
desc.en: The user yells as if it's ranting about something, which lowers the Sp. Atk stats of opposing Pokémon.

desc.es: Lanza grandes carámbanos. Puede amedrentar al objetivo.
desc.en: The user attacks by crashing large icicles onto the target. This may also make the target flinch.

desc.es: Golpea con una V de llamas al objetivo. Baja la  Defensa, la Defensa Especial y la Velocidad de  quien lo usa.
desc.en: With a hot flame on its forehead, the user hurls itself at its target. This lowers the user’s Defense, Sp. Def, and Speed stats.

desc.es: Ataca con una llamarada gigantesca. Aumenta su  potencia si es influenciada por una gran energía eléctrica.
desc.en: The user brings down a giant flame. This move's power is boosted when influenced by an enormous lightning bolt.

desc.es: Ataca con una enorme descarga eléctrica. Aumenta  su potencia si es influenciada por una gigantesca  llamarada.
desc.en: The user throws down a giant lightning bolt. This move's power is boosted when influenced by an enormous flame.

desc.es: El Pokémon que lo usa se lanza sobre su oponente.  Este movimiento es de tipo Lucha y tipo Volador al  mismo tiempo.
desc.en: The user dives down onto the target from the sky. This move is Fighting and Flying type simultaneously.

desc.es: El usuario usa un tatami para escudarse de los ataques enemigos. Protege también a los aliados. No funciona contra movimientos de estado.
desc.en: Using a pulled-up mat as a shield, the user protects itself and its allies from damaging moves. This does not stop status moves.

desc.es: El Pokémon causa daño a su oponente lanzándole  un eructo. Para poder utilizar este movimiento tiene  que llevar una baya y comérsela.
desc.en: The user lets out a damaging belch at the target. The user must eat a held Berry to use this move.

desc.es: Este movimiento no se puede usar, por lo que sería mejor olvidarlo, aunque eso implique que no se pueda recordar posteriormente.
desc.en: This move can’t be used. It’s recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can’t be remembered.

desc.es: Coloca una red pegajosa alrededor del equipo rival que baja la Velocidad de cualquier adversario que entre a combatir.
desc.en: The user weaves a sticky net around the opposing team, which lowers their Speed stats upon switching into battle.

desc.es: Si se derrota al objetivo utilizando este movimiento, aumenta muchísimo el Ataque del usuario.
desc.en: When the user knocks out a target with this move, the user's Attack stat is boosted drastically.

desc.es: El usuario desaparece en el primer turno y ataca a su objetivo en el segundo. Permite acertar aunque el objetivo esté protegiéndose.
desc.en: The user vanishes somewhere, then strikes the target on the next turn. This move hits even if the target protects itself.

desc.es: Invita al objetivo a celebrar Halloween, lo que añade  el tipo Fantasma a los tipos de este.
desc.en: The user takes the target trick-or-treating. This adds Ghost type to the target’s type.

desc.es: Intimida a su oponente con un rugido de guerra, lo que hace que disminuyan tanto su Ataque como su Ataque Especial.
desc.en: Letting out a noble roar, the user intimidates the target and lowers the target's Attack and Sp. Atk stats.

desc.es: Este movimiento no se puede usar, por lo que sería mejor olvidarlo, aunque eso implique que no se pueda recordar posteriormente.
desc.en: This move can’t be used. It’s recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can’t be remembered.

desc.es: Inflige daño a todos los Pokémon a su alrededor. El usuario absorbe la mitad del daño producido para restaurar sus propios PS.
desc.en: The user attacks everything around it. The user's HP is restored by half the damage taken by those hit.

desc.es: El objetivo es presa de la maldición del bosque, por lo que pasa a ser un Pokémon de tipo Planta, además de conservar sus tipos habituales.
desc.en: The user puts a forest curse on the target. This adds Grass type to the target's type.

desc.es: El usuario desata un intenso vendaval de pétalos que daña a los Pokémon a su alrededor.
desc.en: The user stirs up a violent petal blizzard and damages everything around it.

desc.es: Enfría súbitamente al objetivo e incluso puede congelarlo. Es supereficaz contra Pokémon de tipo Agua.
desc.en: The user rapidly cools the target. This may also leave the target frozen. This move is super effective on Water types.

desc.es: Obnubila a los oponentes con su fascinante voz y les provoca daños emocionales. Siempre acierta al objetivo.
desc.en: Letting out a charming cry, the user does emotional damage to opposing Pokémon. This attack never misses.

desc.es: El usuario se cambia por otro Pokémon de su equipo, pero antes amedrenta a su oponente y hace que disminuyan su Ataque y Ataque Especial.
desc.en: With a parting threat, the user lowers the target's Attack and Sp. Atk stats. Then it switches places with a party Pokémon in waiting.

desc.es: Invierte por completo los cambios en las características del objetivo.
desc.en: All stat changes affecting the target turn topsy-turvy and become the opposite of what they were.

desc.es: El usuario absorbe PS del objetivo con un beso y restaura su propia energía en una cantidad igual o superior a la mitad del daño infligido.
desc.en: The user steals the target's HP with a kiss. The user's HP is restored by over half the damage taken by the target.

desc.es: Usa unos misteriosos poderes para protegerse a sí  mismo y a sus aliados de movimientos de estado, pero no de otro tipo de ataques.
desc.en: The user protects itself and its allies from status moves with a mysterious power. This does not stop moves that do damage.

desc.es: Aumenta la Defensa de todos los Pokémon de tipo Planta que hay en el combate usando unos misteriosos poderes.
desc.en: The user raises the Defense stats of all Grass-type Pokémon in battle with a mysterious power.

desc.es: Durante cinco turnos, se potencian los movimientos de tipo Planta y los Pokémon que están en contacto con el suelo recuperan PS en cada turno.
desc.en: The user turns the ground into Grassy Terrain for five turns. This restores the HP of Pokémon on the ground a little every turn and powers up Grass-type moves.

desc.es: Durante cinco turnos, los Pokémon que están en el suelo no sufren problemas de estado y se reduce a la mitad el daño de los movimientos de tipo Dragón.
desc.en: This protects Pokémon on the ground from status conditions and halves damage from Dragon-type moves for five turns.

desc.es: Si el objetivo queda electrificado antes de usar un movimiento, este será de tipo Eléctrico.
desc.en: If the target is electrified before it uses a move during that turn, the target’s move becomes Electric type.

desc.es: El Pokémon que lo usa le hace cucamonas al objetivo y lo ataca. Puede disminuir el Ataque del objetivo.
desc.en: The user attacks by playing rough with the target. This may also lower the target's Attack stat.

desc.es: El Pokémon que lo usa desata un vendaval feérico que arremete contra el objetivo.
desc.en: The user attacks by stirring up a fairy wind to strike the target.

desc.es: Invoca el poder de la luna para atacar al objetivo.  Puede disminuir el Ataque Especial del objetivo.
desc.en: Borrowing the power of the moon, the user attacks the target. This may also lower the target's Sp. Atk stat.

desc.es: Ataca a todos los Pokémon a su alrededor con una  potentísima onda sonora.
desc.en: The user attacks everything around it with the destructive power of a terrible explosive sound.

desc.es: Consigue que ningún Pokémon pueda huir en el  siguiente turno echando un cerrojo.
desc.en: By locking down the battlefield, the user keeps all Pokémon from fleeing during the next turn.

desc.es: El usuario adopta una postura defensiva y se protege de cualquier daño. Reduce el Ataque de cualquier Pokémon con el que entre en contacto.
desc.en: The user takes a defensive stance while it protects itself from damage. It also lowers the Attack stat of any attacker that makes direct contact.

desc.es: Se hace amigo de su oponente y consigue que a este se le quiten las ganas de combatir. Además, reduce su Ataque.
desc.en: The user and the target become friends, and the target loses its will to fight. This lowers the target's Attack stat.

desc.es: Hace que el objetivo pierda la concentración  contándole un secreto. Disminuye el Ataque Especial del oponente.
desc.en: The user tells the target a secret, and the target loses its ability to concentrate. This lowers the target's Sp. Atk stat.

desc.es: Desata un devastador vendaval de diamantes para  dañar a los oponentes. Puede aumentar mucho la Defensa del usuario.
desc.en: The user whips up a storm of diamonds to damage opposing Pokémon. This may also sharply boost the user's Defense stat.

desc.es: Envuelve al Pokémon oponente con vapor extremadamente caliente que puede llegar a quemarlo.
desc.en: The user immerses the target in superheated steam. This may also leave the target with a burn.

desc.es: El usuario aparece junto al rival usando un agujero dimensional y le asesta un golpe que movimientos como Protección o Detección no pueden evitar.
desc.en: Using a hyperspace hole, the user appears right next to the target and strikes. This attack can hit a target using a move such as Protect or Detect.

desc.es: Golpea al oponente de dos a cinco veces con estrellas arrojadizas hechas de mucosidad. Este movimiento tiene prioridad alta.
desc.en: The user hits the target with throwing stars two to five times in a row. This move always goes first.

desc.es: El usuario lanza por la boca una singular llama a gran temperatura con la que ataca a su oponente y baja su Ataque Especial.
desc.en: The user attacks by breathing a special, hot fire. This also lowers the target's Sp. Atk stat.

desc.es: Protege al usuario de ataques, e inflige daño a quien se los lance si entra en contacto con él.
desc.en: In addition to protecting the user from attacks, this move also damages any attacker that makes direct contact.

desc.es: Consigue aumentar la Defensa Especial de un Pokémon de su equipo con una fragancia misteriosa.
desc.en: The user boosts the Sp. Def stat of an ally Pokémon by using a mysterious aroma.

desc.es: El usuario irradia unas raras ondas que, al alcanzar a un oponente, hacen que disminuya mucho su Ataque Especial.
desc.en: The user's body generates an eerie impulse. Exposing the target to it harshly lowers the target's Sp. Atk stat.

desc.es: Impregna a su objetivo con un líquido venenoso que disminuye el Ataque, el Ataque Especial y la Velocidad. Solo afecta a Pokémon ya envenenados.
desc.en: Opposing Pokémon are drenched in an odd poisonous liquid. This lowers the Attack, Sp. Atk, and Speed stats of a poisoned target.

desc.es: Esparce un polvo sobre el objetivo. Si este usa un movimiento de tipo Fuego en el mismo turno, el polvo explota y le inflige daño.
desc.en: The user covers the target in a combustible powder. If the target uses a Fire-type move, the powder explodes and damages the target.

desc.es: Concentra energía durante el primer turno, de forma que su Velocidad, Ataque Especial y Defensa Especial aumenten mucho en el segundo.
desc.en: The user absorbs energy and sharply raises its Sp. Atk, Sp. Def, and Speed stats on the next turn.

desc.es: Manipula el campo magnético y logra aumentar la Defensa y la Defensa Especial de los Pokémon aliados que cuenten con las habilidades Más y Menos.
desc.en: The user manipulates magnetic fields, which boosts the Defense and Sp. Def stats of ally Pokémon with the Plus Ability or the Minus Ability.

desc.es: Al usar este movimiento se consigue duplicar la  recompensa recibida tras el combate.
desc.en: Using Happy Hour doubles the amount of prize money received after battle.

desc.es: Durante cinco turnos, se potencian los movimientos de tipo Eléctrico y los Pokémon que están en contacto con el suelo no pueden quedarse dormidos.
desc.en: The user turns the ground into Electric Terrain for five turns, powering up Electric-type moves. Pokémon on the ground can no longer fall asleep.

desc.es: Inflige daño a los oponentes con una potente luz.
desc.en: The user damages opposing Pokémon by emitting a powerful flash.

desc.es: El Pokémon te felicita en un día muy especial para ti.
desc.en: The Pokémon congratulates you on your special day!

desc.es: El Pokémon le da la mano a un aliado y ambos se  sienten muy felices.
desc.en: The user and an ally hold hands. This makes them very happy.

desc.es: Lanza una mirada al objetivo con ojos acaramelados, con lo que logra que su Ataque se reduzca. Este movimiento tiene prioridad alta.
desc.en: The user stares at the target with its baby-doll eyes, which lowers the target's Attack stat. This move always goes first.

desc.es: Quien lo usa frota sus mofletes cargados de electricidad contra el objetivo y consigue paralizarlo.
desc.en: The user attacks by nuzzling its electrified cheeks against the target. This also leaves the target with paralysis.

desc.es: El usuario se contiene a la hora de atacar y deja al objetivo con al menos 1 PS.
desc.en: The user holds back when it attacks, and the target is left with at least 1 HP.

desc.es: Hostiga al objetivo durante cuatro o cinco turnos e impide que pueda huir mientras tanto.
desc.en: The target is infested and attacked for four to five turns. The target can't flee during this time.

desc.es: Cada vez que golpea a un oponente se endurecen sus puños. Si acierta al objetivo, el Ataque del usuario aumenta.
desc.en: Striking opponents over and over makes the user’s fists harder. Hitting a target raises the Attack stat.

desc.es: El usuario absorbe energía del objetivo y aumenta sus PS en una cantidad igual o superior a la mitad del daño infligido.
desc.en: The user absorbs its target’s HP. The user’s HP is restored by over half of the damage taken by the target.

desc.es: Acierta incluso a Pokémon que estén en el aire y los hace caer al suelo.
desc.en: This move also hits opposing Pokémon that are in the air. Those Pokémon are knocked down to the ground.

desc.es: El usuario genera ondas sísmicas que se propagan por el suelo y sacuden a los oponentes. Los Pokémon alcanzados no podrán huir del combate.
desc.en: The user attacks with a wave that crawls along the ground. Those it hits can’t flee from battle.

desc.es: Acumula energía de la corteza terrestre y la concentra contra los oponentes, dañándolos.
desc.en: The user gathers the energy of the land and focuses that power on opposing Pokémon to damage them.

desc.es: El usuario emplea el poder de la Flor Eterna para lanzar un potente rayo de luz, pero sufre bastante daño al hacerlo.
desc.en: Drawing power from the Eternal Flower, the user fires a powerful beam of light. This also damages the user quite a lot.

desc.es: Ataca al objetivo con una infinidad de rayos de luz  azulada.
desc.en: The user attacks opposing Pokémon with countless beams of light that glow a deep and brilliant blue.

desc.es: Hace que el poder latente de la tierra se manifieste en forma de hojas afiladas y ataca al objetivo con ellas.
desc.en: The user attacks opposing Pokémon by manifesting the power of the land in fearsome blades of stone.

desc.es: El usuario se precipita desde el cielo a una velocidad de vértigo para atacar al objetivo, pero hace que bajen la Defensa y la Defensa Especial del usuario.
desc.en: The user attacks the target by dropping out of the sky at high speed. This also lowers the user's Defense and Sp. Def stats.

desc.es: Ataca al objetivo con una ráfaga de golpes que pasan por alto los efectos de movimientos como Protección o Detección. Baja la Defensa del usuario.
desc.en: Using its many arms, the user unleashes a barrage of attacks that ignore the effects of moves like Protect and Detect. This also lowers the user's Defense stat.

desc.es: Este movimiento no se puede usar, por lo que sería mejor olvidarlo, aunque eso implique que no se pueda recordar posteriormente.
desc.en: This move can’t be used. It’s recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can’t be remembered.

desc.es: Restaura la mitad de los PS máximos del usuario. Durante las tormentas de arena, restaura aún más PS.
desc.en: The user restores its own HP by up to half its max HP. It regains more HP in a sandstorm.

desc.es: Movimiento de gran potencia que solo puede usarse en el turno en que el usuario sale al combate.
desc.en: Although this move has great power, it works only on the first turn each time the user enters battle.

desc.es: Protege de los ataques y, al mismo tiempo, envenena al Pokémon que use un movimiento de contacto contra el usuario.
desc.en: In addition to protecting the user from attacks, this move also poisons any attacker that makes direct contact.

desc.es: Ataca al oponente y, al mismo tiempo, fija su sombra al terreno para impedir su huida.
desc.en: The user attacks while simultaneously stitching the target's shadow to the ground to prevent the target from fleeing.

desc.es: Gira sobre sí mismo y golpea al oponente con ambos brazos. Ignora los cambios en las características del objetivo.
desc.en: The user swings both arms and hits the target. The target's stat changes don't affect the damage inflicted by this move.

desc.es: Libera burbujas al cantar. Este movimiento cura las quemaduras de los Pokémon que reciban daño.
desc.en: The user bursts into song, emitting many bubbles. Any Pokémon suffering from a burn will be cured by the touch of these bubbles.

desc.es: Un terrible puño golpea al contrincante, pero la Velocidad del usuario se ve reducida.
desc.en: The user swings its strong, heavy fist at the target to inflict damage. This also lowers the user's Speed stat.

desc.es: Restaura la mitad de los PS máximos del objetivo. Es más efectivo cuando se usa en conjunción con Campo de Hierba.
desc.en: The user restores the target's HP by up to half its max HP. More HP is restored when the ground is Grassy Terrain.

desc.es: Asesta un golpe devastador usando todo su cuerpo.
desc.en: The user fiercely attacks the target using its entire body.

desc.es: Restaura una cantidad de PS equivalente al valor de Ataque del rival, que además verá reducida esta característica.
desc.en: The user restores its own HP by the same amount as the target's Attack stat. It then lowers the target's Attack stat.

desc.es: El usuario dedica un turno a absorber energía lumínica y concentrarla en forma de cuchilla con la que ataca al rival en el siguiente turno.
desc.en: The user gathers light on the first turn, then fills a blade with the light's energy and attacks on the next turn.

desc.es: Ataca al oponente lanzando hojas.
desc.en: The user attacks by pelting the target with leaves.

desc.es: Este movimiento no se puede usar, por lo que sería mejor olvidarlo, aunque eso implique que no se pueda recordar posteriormente.
desc.en: This move can’t be used. It’s recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can’t be remembered.

desc.es: Ataca al oponente con hilillos venenosos que reducen su Velocidad y lo envenenan.
desc.en: The user shoots poisonous threads to poison the target and lower the target's Speed stat.

desc.es: El usuario se concentra para que el siguiente ataque propine un golpe crítico.
desc.en: The user concentrates intensely. The attack on the next turn always results in a critical hit.

desc.es: Cambia de marcha y logra aumentar el Ataque y el Ataque Especial de los Pokémon aliados que cuenten con las habilidades Más y Menos.
desc.en: The user engages its gears to raise the Attack and Sp. Atk stats of ally Pokémon with the Plus or Minus Ability.

desc.es: Inflige al rival un dolor tan abrumador que le impide utilizar durante dos turnos ataques que se sirven del sonido.
desc.en: The user attacks the target's throat, and the resultant suffering prevents the target from using sound-based moves for two turns.

desc.es: Ataca al oponente con una bola explosiva. Si esta alcanza a un aliado, le hará recuperar PS.
desc.en: The user attacks the enemy with a pollen puff that explodes. If the target is an ally, it gives the ally a pollen puff that restores its HP instead.

desc.es: Ataca lanzando un ancla al oponente, que queda atrapado y no puede huir.
desc.en: The user entangles the target with its anchor chain while attacking. The target becomes unable to flee.

desc.es: Durante cinco turnos, se potencian los movimientos de tipo Psíquico y los Pokémon que están en el suelo quedan protegidos contra movimientos con prioridad.
desc.en: This protects Pokémon on the ground from priority moves and powers up Psychic-type moves for five turns.

desc.es: Ataca al oponente abalanzándose sobre él con todas sus fuerzas y reduce su Ataque.
desc.en: The user makes a lunge at the target, attacking with full force. This also lowers the target's Attack stat.

desc.es: Golpea al oponente con un látigo incandescente y reduce su Defensa.
desc.en: The user strikes the target with a burning lash. This also lowers the target's Defense stat.

desc.es: Ataca al oponente presumiendo de su fuerza. Cuanto más hayan subido las características del usuario, mayor será el daño.
desc.en: The user boasts its strength and attacks the target. The more the user's stats are boosted, the greater the move's power.

desc.es: Utiliza hasta el último resquicio de llamas de su cuerpo para infligir un grave daño al oponente. Tras el ataque, el usuario deja de ser de tipo Fuego.
desc.en: To inflict massive damage, the user burns itself out. After using this move, the user will no longer be Fire type.

desc.es: Intercambia su Velocidad por la del oponente.
desc.en: The user exchanges Speed stats with the target.

desc.es: El usuario ensarta al adversario con su afilada cornamenta. Este movimiento acierta siempre.
desc.en: The user stabs the target with a sharp horn. This attack never misses.

desc.es: Cura los problemas de estado del Pokémon rival y a cambio recupera PS propios.
desc.en: The user heals the target’s status condition. If the move succeeds, it also restores the user’s own HP.

desc.es: Ataque que consiste en un baile muy enérgico. El tipo de este ataque se corresponde con el del Pokémon que lo ejecuta.
desc.en: The user attacks the target by dancing with all its might. This move becomes the same type as the user's type.

desc.es: Inflige daño al rival, y si este ya ha hecho uso de algún movimiento, pierde su habilidad.
desc.en: If the Pokémon the user has inflicted damage on have already used their moves, this move eliminates the effect of the target’s Ability.

desc.es: Lanza una patada con la fuerza del trópico que golpea al rival y reduce su Ataque.
desc.en: The user lands an intense kick of tropical origins on the target. This also lowers the target's Attack stat.

desc.es: Fuerza al objetivo a repetir inmediatamente su último movimiento.
desc.en: The user instructs the target to reuse the move last used by the target.

desc.es: Primero aumenta la temperatura de su pico y luego ejecuta un ataque. Quema al rival si este le propina un ataque físico mientras está calentando el pico.
desc.en: The user first heats up its beak, and then it attacks the target. Making direct contact with the user while it's heating up its beak results in a burn.

desc.es: Frota todas las escamas de su cuerpo para crear un fuerte sonido con el que ataca. Cuando el ataque termina, su Defensa se ve reducida.
desc.en: The user rubs the scales on its entire body and makes a huge noise to attack opposing Pokémon. The user's Defense stat is lowered after the attack.

desc.es: Usa el cuerpo como un martillo para abalanzarse sobre su rival y causarle daño.
desc.en: The user wields its body like a hammer to attack the target and inflict damage.

desc.es: Hace pivotar su cuerpo para causar daño a su alrededor.
desc.en: The user swings its body around violently to inflict damage on everything in its vicinity.

desc.es: Reduce el daño de los ataques físicos y especiales que ejecuta el rival durante cinco turnos. Solo puede usarse cuando está granizando.
desc.en: This move reduces damage from physical and special moves for five turns. This can be used only when it is snowing.

desc.es: El caparazón del Pokémon se convierte en una trampa. Si le alcanza un ataque físico, la trampa estalla y los oponentes sufren daño.
desc.en: The user sets a shell trap. If the user is hit by a physical move, the trap will explode and inflict damage on opposing Pokémon.

desc.es: El usuario emite un potente rayo, pero su Ataque Especial se reduce mucho.
desc.en: The user unleashes a strong beam. The recoil from this move harshly lowers the user's Sp. Atk stat.

desc.es: Ataca a sus rivales con poderes psíquicos que además destruyen barreras como Pantalla de Luz y Reflejo.
desc.en: The user attacks by biting the target with its psychic capabilities. This move can also break barriers, such as Light Screen and Reflect.

desc.es: Usa la frustración como revulsivo para atacar. La potencia de Pataleta se duplica si el usuario ha fallado el último movimiento usado.
desc.en: Driven by frustration, the user attacks the target. This move's power is doubled if the user's previous move failed.

desc.es: Ataca al oponente golpeándole con un hueso poseído por un espíritu. Puede reducir la Defensa del objetivo.
desc.en: The user attacks by beating the target with a bone that contains a spirit. This may also lower the target’s Defense stat.

desc.es: El usuario se lanza contra el objetivo a gran velocidad. Este movimiento tiene prioridad alta.
desc.en: The user smashes into the target at high speed. This move always goes first.

desc.es: Ataca golpeando gracias a la fuerza del agua. También puede reducir la Defensa del objetivo.
desc.en: The user slams into the target using a full-force blast of water. This may also lower the target's Defense stat.

desc.es: El usuario utiliza un prisma para emitir un rayo de gran potencia, pero no puede moverse en el turno siguiente.
desc.en: The user shoots powerful lasers using the power of a prism. The user can't move on the next turn.

desc.es: El usuario se esconde en la sombra del objetivo y lo ataca tras robarle las mejoras en sus características.
desc.en: The user hides in the target’s shadow, steals the target’s stat boosts, and then attacks.

desc.es: Ataca al objetivo con la potencia de un meteoro, ignorando su habilidad.
desc.en: The user slams into the target with the force of a meteor. This move can be used on the target regardless of its Ability.

desc.es: Ataca con un rayo misterioso que ignora la habilidad del objetivo.
desc.en: The user emits a sinister ray to attack the target. This move can be used on the target regardless of its Ability.

desc.es: Mira al objetivo con ojos llorosos para hacerle perder su espíritu combativo y reduce su Ataque y Ataque Especial.
desc.en: The user gets teary-eyed to make the target lose its combative spirit. This lowers the target's Attack and Sp. Atk stats.

desc.es: Se lanza contra el objetivo y le suelta una potente descarga eléctrica que puede hacer que se amedrente.
desc.en: The user crashes into the target, delivering a powerful electric shock. This may also make the target flinch.

desc.es: Golpea al objetivo con la furia de la naturaleza y reduce sus PS a la mitad.
desc.en: The user hits the target with the force of nature. It halves the target’s HP.

desc.es: El Pokémon se rodea de una potente energía con la que golpea al rival. El tipo del movimiento depende del disco que lleva el usuario.
desc.en: Cloaking itself in high energy, the user slams into the target. The memory held determines the move’s type.

desc.es: Este movimiento no se puede usar, por lo que sería mejor olvidarlo, aunque eso implique que no se pueda recordar posteriormente.
desc.en: This move can’t be used. It’s recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can’t be remembered.

desc.es: El usuario hace explotar su cabeza para atacar a todos los Pokémon que se hallan a su alrededor, aunque también se hiere a sí mismo.
desc.en: The user attacks everything around it by causing its own head to explode. This also damages the user.

desc.es: El usuario ataca con puños cargados de electricidad. Convierte los movimientos de tipo Normal en movimientos de tipo Eléctrico.
desc.en: The user attacks with electrically charged fists. This move changes Normal-type moves to Electric-type moves.

desc.es: El usuario ataca con una gran columna de luz. Compara sus valores de Ataque y Ataque Especial para infligir daño con el más alto de los dos.
desc.en: The user attacks the target with a pillar of light. This move inflicts damage using the Attack or Sp. Atk stat—whichever is higher for the user.

desc.es: Usando la tuerca del pecho como eje, gira sobre sí mismo y golpea con los brazos dos veces seguidas. Puede amedrentar al rival.
desc.en: The user rotates, centering the hex nut in its chest, and then strikes with its arms twice in a row. This may also make the target flinch.

desc.es: Frena todos los ataques, pero puede fallar si se usa repetidamente.
desc.en: This move enables the user to protect itself from all attacks. Its chance of failing rises if it is used in succession.

desc.es: El usuario ataca emitiendo un rayo desde su núcleo. El daño infligido se duplica si el objetivo ha alcanzado el estado Dinamax.
desc.en: The user condenses energy within its body and unleashes that energy from its core to inflict damage.

desc.es: Permite atacar al objetivo seleccionado ignorando las habilidades o movimientos que permiten a un rival centrar la atención sobre sí.
desc.en: The user ignores the effects of opposing Pokémon's moves and Abilities that draw in moves, allowing this move to hit the chosen target.

desc.es: Impide que tanto el atacante como el defensor puedan ser intercambiados hasta que uno de ellos se debilite o abandone el terreno de combate.
desc.en: This move prevents the user and the target from switching out until either of them faints. The effect goes away if either of the Pokémon leaves the field.

desc.es: El usuario ingiere la baya que lleva equipada para aumentar mucho su Defensa.
desc.en: The user eats its held Berry, then sharply boosts its Defense stat.

desc.es: El usuario aumenta todas sus características, pero ya no puede huir ni ser cambiado por otro.
desc.en: This move boosts all the user's stats but prevents the user from switching out or fleeing.

desc.es: Cubre al objetivo de un alquitrán pegajoso que reduce su Velocidad y lo vuelve débil contra el fuego.
desc.en: The user pours sticky tar over the target, lowering the target's Speed stat. The target becomes weaker to Fire-type moves.

desc.es: Cubre al objetivo con unos polvos mágicos que le hacen adquirir el tipo Psíquico.
desc.en: The user scatters a cloud of magic powder that changes the target's type to Psychic.

desc.es: El usuario ataca propulsando a ambos Dreepy. En caso de haber dos adversarios, cada Dreepy golpea a su propio objetivo por separado.
desc.en: The user attacks twice using Dreepy. If there are two opposing Pokémon, this move hits each of them once.

desc.es: El usuario invita a tomar el té a todos los presentes en el terreno de combate, lo que hace que ingieran las bayas que lleven equipadas.
desc.en: The user has teatime with all the Pokémon currently in the battle. Each Pokémon eats its held Berry.

desc.es: Retiene al objetivo para impedir su huida, a la vez que reduce su Defensa y Defensa Especial cada turno.
desc.en: The user locks the target in and prevents it from fleeing. This move also lowers the target’s Defense and Sp. Def every turn.

desc.es: El usuario ensarta al objetivo con su pico cargado de electricidad. Si ataca en primer lugar, la potencia del movimiento se duplica.
desc.en: The user stabs the target with its electrified beak. If the user attacks before the target, the power of this move is doubled.

desc.es: El usuario agarra al objetivo con sus duras branquias. En caso de atacar antes que este último, la potencia del movimiento se duplica.
desc.en: The user rends the target with its hard gills. If the user attacks before the target, the power of this move is doubled.

desc.es: Extraño poder que intercambia los efectos en el terreno de combate de ambos bandos.
desc.en: With its mysterious power, the user swaps the effects on either side of the field.

desc.es: Ataque de tipo Fuego ejecutado por un Pokémon Dinamax. Hace que se intensifique el efecto del sol durante cinco turnos.
desc.en: This is a Fire-type attack Dynamax Pokémon use. The user intensifies the sun for five turns.

desc.es: Ataque de tipo Bicho ejecutado por un Pokémon Dinamax. Reduce el Ataque Especial del objetivo.
desc.en: This is a Bug-type attack Dynamax Pokémon use. This lowers the target’s Sp. Atk stat.

desc.es: Ataque de tipo Eléctrico ejecutado por un Pokémon Dinamax. Crea un campo eléctrico durante cinco turnos.
desc.en: This is an Electric-type attack Dynamax Pokémon use. The user turns the ground into Electric Terrain for five turns.

desc.es: Ataque de tipo Normal ejecutado por un Pokémon Dinamax. Reduce la Velocidad del objetivo.
desc.en: This is a Normal-type attack Dynamax Pokémon use. This lowers the target’s Speed stat.

desc.es: Ataque de tipo Lucha ejecutado por un Pokémon Dinamax. Aumenta el Ataque de tu bando.
desc.en: This is a Fighting-type attack Dynamax Pokémon use. This raises ally Pokémon’s Attack stats.

desc.es: Ataque de tipo Fantasma ejecutado por un Pokémon Dinamax. Reduce la Defensa de los rivales.
desc.en: This is a Ghost-type attack Dynamax Pokémon use. This lowers the target’s Defense stat.

desc.es: Ataque de tipo Hielo ejecutado por un Pokémon Dinamax. Crea una tormenta de granizo que dura cinco turnos.
desc.en: This is an Ice-type attack Dynamax Pokémon use. The user summons a hailstorm lasting five turns.

desc.es: Ataque de tipo Veneno ejecutado por un Pokémon Dinamax. Aumenta el Ataque Especial de tu bando.
desc.en: This is a Poison-type attack Dynamax Pokémon use. This raises ally Pokémon’s Sp. Atk stats.

desc.es: Ataque de tipo Agua ejecutado por un Pokémon Dinamax. Desata un aguacero que dura cinco turnos.
desc.en: This is a Water-type attack Dynamax Pokémon use. The user summons a heavy rain that falls for five turns.

desc.es: Ataque de tipo Volador ejecutado por un Pokémon Dinamax. Aumenta la Velocidad de tu bando.
desc.en: This is a Flying-type attack Dynamax Pokémon use. This raises ally Pokémon’s Speed stats.

desc.es: Ataque de tipo Hada ejecutado por un Pokémon Dinamax. Crea un campo de niebla durante cinco turnos.
desc.en: This is a Fairy-type attack Dynamax Pokémon use. The user turns the ground into Misty Terrain for five turns.

desc.es: Ataque de tipo Dragón ejecutado por un Pokémon Dinamax. Reduce el Ataque del objetivo.
desc.en: This is a Dragon-type attack Dynamax Pokémon use. This lowers the target’s Attack stat.

desc.es: Ataque de tipo Psíquico ejecutado por un Pokémon Dinamax. Crea un campo psíquico durante cinco turnos.
desc.en: This is a Psychic-type attack Dynamax Pokémon use. The user turns the ground into Psychic Terrain for five turns.

desc.es: Ataque de tipo Roca ejecutado por un Pokémon Dinamax. Levanta una tormenta de arena que dura cinco turnos.
desc.en: This is a Rock-type attack Dynamax Pokémon use. The user summons a sandstorm lasting five turns.

desc.es: Ataque de tipo Tierra ejecutado por un Pokémon Dinamax. Aumenta la Defensa Especial de tu bando.
desc.en: This is a Ground-type attack Dynamax Pokémon use. This raises ally Pokémon’s Sp. Def stats.

desc.es: Ataque de tipo Siniestro ejecutado por un Pokémon Dinamax. Reduce la Defensa Especial del objetivo.
desc.en: This is a Dark-type attack Dynamax Pokémon use. This lowers the target’s Sp. Def stat.

desc.es: Ataque de tipo Planta ejecutado por un Pokémon Dinamax. Crea un campo de hierba durante cinco turnos.
desc.en: This is a Grass-type attack Dynamax Pokémon use. The user turns the ground into Grassy Terrain for five turns.

desc.es: Ataque de tipo Acero ejecutado por un Pokémon Dinamax. Aumenta la Defensa de tu bando.
desc.en: This is a Steel-type attack Dynamax Pokémon use. This raises ally Pokémon’s Defense stats.

desc.es: Utiliza parte de los PS propios para subir sus características.
desc.en: The user boosts all its stats by using some of its own HP.

desc.es: El usuario usa el cuerpo para lanzar su ataque e infligir un daño directamente proporcional a su Defensa.
desc.en: The user attacks by slamming its body into the target. The higher the user's Defense stat, the greater the damage this move deals.

desc.es: Aumenta mucho el Ataque y el Ataque Especial del objetivo al decorarlo.
desc.en: The user sharply boosts the target's Attack and Sp. Atk stats by decorating the target.

desc.es: El usuario controla un tocón mediante la percusión y al atacar reduce la Velocidad del objetivo.
desc.en: The user plays its drum, controlling the drum's roots to attack the target. This also lowers the target's Speed stat.

desc.es: Cepo que atrapa al objetivo durante cuatro o cinco turnos y le causa daño mientras se encuentra preso.
desc.en: The user snares the target in a snap trap for four to five turns.

desc.es: El usuario prende una pequeña piedra para crear una bola de fuego con la que ataca al rival. Puede causar quemaduras.
desc.en: The user attacks by igniting a small stone and launching it as a fiery ball at the target. This may also leave the target with a burn.

desc.es: El usuario se convierte en una espada gigante para rebanar al objetivo. Si este ha alcanzado el estado Dinamax, se duplica el daño infligido.
desc.en: The user becomes a gigantic sword and cuts the target. This move deals twice the damage if the target is Dynamaxed.

desc.es: El usuario se convierte en un escudo gigante para golpear al objetivo. Si este ha alcanzado el estado Dinamax, se duplica el daño infligido.
desc.en: The user becomes a gigantic shield and slams into the target. This move deals twice the damage if the target is Dynamaxed.

desc.es: La energía que acumula en las mejillas le sirve para atacar y aumentar su Velocidad. Este movimiento cambia de tipo según la forma que adopte Morpeko.
desc.en: Morpeko attacks and boosts its Speed stat with the energy stored in its cheeks. This move's type changes depending on the user's form.

desc.es: El usuario sacude violentamente su enorme cola para golpear a todos los rivales y reducir su Ataque a la par.
desc.en: The user swings its tough tail wildly and attacks opposing Pokémon. This also lowers their Attack stats.

desc.es: Ataca pinchando al objetivo con una rama afilada.
desc.en: The user attacks the target by poking it with a sharply pointed branch.

desc.es: El usuario rasguea la guitarra o el bajo para generar enormes vibraciones de intensa reverberación con las que ataca al objetivo.
desc.en: The user attacks opposing Pokémon by twanging a guitar or bass guitar, causing a huge echo and strong vibration.

desc.es: Ataca al objetivo con el fluido corrosivo que desprende una manzana ácida, lo que también disminuye la Defensa Especial de este.
desc.en: The user attacks the target with an acidic liquid created from tart apples. This also lowers the target's Sp. Def stat.

desc.es: El usuario ataca haciendo caer una manzana desde gran altura. Disminuye la Defensa del objetivo.
desc.en: The user inflicts damage by dropping an apple from high above. This also lowers the target's Defense stat.

desc.es: El usuario ataca al objetivo con tal ímpetu que acaba minando su moral y, en consecuencia, reduce su Ataque Especial.
desc.en: The user attacks the target with so much force that it could break the target's spirit. This also lowers the target's Sp. Atk stat.

desc.es: Desprende un humo con el que ataca al objetivo, que puede acabar confundido.
desc.en: The user attacks the target by emitting steam. This may also confuse the target.

desc.es: Vierte un agua misteriosa y balsámica que restaura tanto sus propios PS como los de aquellos aliados presentes en el terreno de combate.
desc.en: The user scatters mysterious water around and restores the HP of itself and its ally Pokémon currently in the battle.

desc.es: Frena todos los ataques, pero puede fallar si se usa repetidamente. Reduce mucho la Defensa de quien ejecute un movimiento de contacto contra el usuario.
desc.en: This move enables the user to protect itself from all attacks. Its chance of failing rises if it is used in succession. Direct contact harshly lowers the attacker’s Defense stat.

desc.es: El usuario finge hacer una reverencia y aprovecha la ocasión para ensartar al objetivo con su cabello alborotado. Siempre acierta.
desc.en: The user pretends to bow its head, but then it stabs the target with its disheveled hair. This attack never misses.

desc.es: El usuario agita violentamente su grueso puerro para atacar, pero el mareo que le provocan las sacudidas le impide moverse en el turno siguiente.
desc.en: The user attacks wildly with its thick leek. The user can’t move on the next turn, because the force of this move makes it stagger.

desc.es: Este es el mayor ataque de Eternatus una vez adquirida su forma original. No puede moverse en el turno siguiente.
desc.en: This is Eternatus’s most powerful attack in its original form. The user can’t move on the next turn.

desc.es: Utiliza el acero de su cuerpo para disparar un potente rayo. También hiere al agresor.
desc.en: The user fires a beam of steel that it collected from its entire body. This also damages the user.

desc.es: El usuario ataca al objetivo con sus poderes psíquicos. Cuando se usa en conjunción con un campo psíquico, aumenta su potencia e inflige daño a todos los rivales.
desc.en: The user attacks the target with its psychic power. When the ground is Psychic Terrain, this move's power is boosted and it damages all opposing Pokémon.

desc.es: El usuario lanza su ataque y destruye el campo activo en el terreno de combate, y falla si no hay ninguno en ese momento.
desc.en: The user attacks while destroying the terrain. This move fails if the ground hasn't turned into a terrain.

desc.es: Lanza escamas al objetivo de dos a cinco veces seguidas. Aumenta la Velocidad del usuario, pero reduce su Defensa.
desc.en: The user attacks by shooting scales two to five times in a row. This move boosts the user's Speed stat but lowers its Defense stat.

desc.es: El usuario dedica el primer turno a aumentar su Ataque Especial acumulando energía cósmica y lanza su ofensiva contra el objetivo en el segundo.
desc.en: The user gathers energy from space and boosts its Sp. Atk stat on the first turn, then attacks on the next turn.

desc.es: El usuario lanza un ataque físico o especial en función de cuál inflija más daño. Puede envenenar al objetivo.
desc.en: This move is either physical or special—whichever will inflict more damage. This may also poison the target.

desc.es: El usuario ataca a todos a su alrededor, pero se debilita de inmediato. La potencia del movimiento aumenta si el terreno está cubierto por un campo de niebla.
desc.en: The user attacks everything around it and faints upon using this move. This move's power is boosted on Misty Terrain.

desc.es: Ataca al objetivo deslizándose sobre el terreno de combate. Este movimiento tiene prioridad alta cuando el terreno está cubierto por un campo de hierba.
desc.en: Gliding on the ground, the user attacks the target. This move always goes first on Grassy Terrain.

desc.es: Ataca con una descarga eléctrica que surge del terreno de combate. La potencia del movimiento se duplica si el rival se ve afectado por un campo eléctrico.
desc.en: The user attacks with electricity rising from the ground. This move's power is doubled if the target is on Electric Terrain.

desc.es: El usuario ataca aprovechando la energía del campo activo, que determina tanto el tipo como la potencia del movimiento.
desc.en: The user utilizes the energy of the terrain to attack. This move’s type and power change depending on the terrain at the time the move is used.

desc.es: Ataca al objetivo por la espalda de forma subrepticia y además reduce su Ataque Especial.
desc.en: The user skitters behind the target to attack. This also lowers the target's Sp. Atk stat.

desc.es: Ataca al objetivo con la energía generada por la envidia y causa quemaduras a los Pokémon cuyas características hayan aumentado en ese turno.
desc.en: The user attacks with energy from jealousy. This leaves all opposing Pokémon that have had their stats boosted during the turn with a burn.

desc.es: Ataca al rival presa de la rabia. Si el usuario ha sufrido una reducción de características en ese turno, la potencia del movimiento se duplica.
desc.en: The user lashes out to vent its frustration toward the target. This move's power is doubled if the user's stats were lowered during this turn.

desc.es: El usuario ataca utilizando el objeto que lleva el rival. Si no tiene ninguno equipado, el movimiento falla.
desc.en: The user attacks by controlling the target's item. This move fails if the target isn't holding an item.

desc.es: El usuario libera un gas cáustico que envuelve a todos los que se encuentren alrededor y derrite por completo los objetos que lleven equipados.
desc.en: The user surrounds everything around it with highly acidic gas and melts away items they hold.

desc.es: El usuario imparte indicaciones precisas a sus aliados, que ven aumentados su Ataque y su Defensa.
desc.en: The user properly coaches its ally Pokémon, boosting their Attack and Defense stats.

desc.es: Tras atacar, el usuario da paso a toda prisa a otro Pokémon del equipo.
desc.en: After making its attack, the user rushes back to switch places with a party Pokémon in waiting.

desc.es: Patea hasta tres veces seguidas y cada vez más fuerte.
desc.en: A consecutive three-kick attack that becomes more powerful with each successful hit.

desc.es: Ataca al adversario golpeándolo dos veces con las alas.
desc.en: The user slams the target with its wings to inflict damage. The target is hit twice in a row.

desc.es: Ataca al objetivo arrojándole arena a temperaturas muy elevadas. Puede causar quemaduras.
desc.en: The user throws scorching sand at the target to attack. This may also leave the target with a burn.

desc.es: Al entrar en plena armonía con la selva, el usuario cura problemas de estado y restaura PS no solo de sí mismo, sino también de los aliados presentes en el terreno.
desc.en: The user becomes one with the jungle, restoring HP and curing status conditions for itself and its ally Pokémon currently in the battle.

desc.es: Golpe devastador que requiere un absoluto dominio de las artes siniestras. Siempre asesta un golpe crítico.
desc.en: The user, having mastered the Dark style, strikes the target with a fierce blow. This move always lands a critical hit.

desc.es: El usuario, dominador absoluto del líquido elemento, golpea hasta tres veces con movimientos fluidos. Siempre asesta un golpe crítico.
desc.en: The user, having mastered the Water style, strikes the target with a flowing motion three times in a row. This move always lands a critical hit.

desc.es: El objetivo queda atrapado en una jaula electrificada que permanece en el terreno de cuatro a cinco turnos.
desc.en: The user traps the target inside a cage of sparking electricity that inflicts damage for four to five turns.

desc.es: El usuario convierte su fuerza vital en una energía con la que ataca al objetivo. Cuantos menos PS tenga el usuario, menor será la potencia del movimiento.
desc.en: Converting its life-force into power, the user attacks opposing Pokémon. The lower the user's HP, the lower the move's power.

desc.es: A través de sus ojos emite poderes psíquicos con los que ataca al objetivo, al que puede llegar a congelar.
desc.en: The user shoots its psychic power from its eyes to attack. This may also leave the target frozen.

desc.es: El usuario convierte su ira en un aura flamígera para lanzar su ataque. Puede amedrentar al objetivo.
desc.en: The user transforms its wrath into a fire-like aura to attack. This may also make opposing Pokémon flinch.

desc.es: El usuario desconcierta al rival con movimientos centelleantes y le propina una patada. Baja la Defensa del objetivo.
desc.en: The user overwhelms the target with lightning-like movement before delivering a kick. This also lowers the target's Defense stat.

desc.es: El usuario ataca al objetivo lanzándole un carámbano de hielo envuelto en una ventisca.
desc.en: The user attacks by hurling a blizzard-cloaked icicle lance at opposing Pokémon.

desc.es: El usuario ataca al objetivo lanzándole una ingente cantidad de pequeños fantasmas.
desc.en: The user attacks by sending a frightful amount of small ghosts at opposing Pokémon.

desc.es: El usuario ataca con un poder psíquico de inmensa potencia y elimina 3 PP del último movimiento que haya usado el objetivo.
desc.en: The user attacks with its tremendous psychic power. This also drains 3 PP from the move last used by the target.
The user lashes out at the target with ruinous claws. This may also leave the target poisoned, paralyzed, or asleep.
Cloaking itself in psychic energy, the user slams into the target. This also boosts the user’s Defense stat.
The user swaps its Attack and Defense stats.
The user swings its stone axes at the target. Stone splinters left behind by this attack float around the target.
The user attacks by wrapping opposing Pokémon in fierce winds brimming with love and hate. This may also lower their Attack stats.
The user attacks by emitting a mysterious power. This also boosts the user’s Sp. Atk stat.
The user rampages around spewing flames for two to three turns. The user then becomes confused.
The user shrouds itself in water and slams into the target with its whole body to inflict damage. This also damages the user quite a lot.
The user launches its amassed chlorophyll to inflict damage on the target. This also damages the user.
The user hurls giant chunks of ice at the target to inflict damage. This may also make the target flinch.
The user performs an intense dance to usher in victory, boosting its Attack, Defense, and Speed stats.
The user smashes into the target in a full-body tackle. This also lowers the user’s Defense and Sp. Def stats.
The user launches countless toxic barbs to inflict damage. This may also poison the target. This move’s power is doubled if the target is already poisoned.
The user slashes the target with aura-enriched wings. This also boosts the user's Speed stat. This move has a heightened chance of landing a critical hit.
The user attacks the target with spine-chilling resentment. This also lowers the target’s Attack stat.
The user makes its skin as hard as an iron shield, sharply boosting its Defense stat.
The user kicks, then fires three arrows. This move has a heightened chance of landing a critical hit and may also lower the target’s Defense stat or make it flinch.
The user attacks with myriad fireballs. This may also leave the target with a burn. This move's power is doubled if the target has a status condition.
The user slashes its shell blade at the target. Shell splinters left behind by this attack remain scattered under the target as spikes.
The user attacks with savagely cold winds that cause both body and spirit to tremble. This may also lower the Speed stats of opposing Pokémon.
The user summons a thunderous tempest and savagely attacks with lightning and wind. This may also leave opposing Pokémon with paralysis.
The user attacks by wrapping opposing Pokémon in fierce winds and searingly hot sand. This may also leave them with a burn.
The user receives a blessing from the crescent moon, restoring HP and curing status conditions for itself and its ally Pokémon currently in the battle.
The user lifts its spirits, curing its own status conditions and boosting its Sp. Atk and Sp. Def stats.
If the user has Terastallized, it unleashes energy of its Tera Type. This move inflicts damage using the Attack or Sp. Atk stat—whichever is higher for the user.
The user spins a silken trap, protecting itself from damage while lowering the Speed stat of any attacker that makes direct contact.
The user attacks by kicking up into the air and slamming its heel down upon the target. This may also confuse the target. If it misses, the user takes damage instead.
The user attacks to avenge its allies. The more defeated allies there are in the user's party, the greater the move's power.
The user attacks by unleashing a peculiar light that even affects the mind. This also harshly lowers the target's Sp. Def stat.
The user attacks with elegant poise. If the user has a Tatsugiri in its mouth, this move boosts one of the user's stats based on the Tatsugiri's form.
The user summons a torrent around its fist and punches at blinding speed. This move always goes first.
The user emits an incredibly spicy extract, sharply boosting the target's Attack stat and harshly lowering the target's Defense stat.
The user spins furiously by straining its legs, inflicting damage on the target. This also harshly lowers the user's Speed stat.
The user’s fellows gather in droves to perform a combo attack that hits the target one to ten times in a row.
The user covers its feet in thin ice and twirls around, slamming into the target. This move's spinning motion also destroys the terrain.
The user throws its entire body into a reckless charge. After this move is used, attacks on the user cannot miss and will inflict double damage until the user’s next turn.
The user bestows a loving blessing, reviving a party Pokémon that has fainted and restoring half that Pokémon's max HP.
The user salt cures the target, inflicting damage every turn. Steel and Water types are more strongly affected by this move.
The user performs a perfectly timed triple dive, hitting the target with splashes of water three times in a row.
The user performs a spin attack that can also eliminate the effects of such moves as Bind, Wrap, and Leech Seed. This also poisons opposing Pokémon.
The user captures the very essence of the target in a sketch. This changes the Abilities of the user and its ally Pokémon to that of the target.
The user sharply boosts its Attack, Sp. Atk, and Speed stats by using its own HP.
The user slashes at the target after kowtowing to make the target let down its guard. This attack never misses.
The user throws a rigged bouquet of flowers at the target. This attack never misses and always lands a critical hit.
The user blows out raging flames as if singing a song, scorching the target. This also boosts the user's Sp. Atk stat.
The user toys with the target and attacks it using light and fluid dance steps. This also boosts the user's Speed stat.
The user performs a tackle like a raging bull. This move's type depends on the user's form. It can also break barriers, such as Light Screen and Reflect.
The user attacks by throwing out a mass of coins. This also lowers the user's Sp. Atk stat. Money is earned after the battle.
The user rends the target with an ethereal blade. This move's power is boosted by 50 percent if the user is on Electric Terrain.
The user blasts the target with boiling-hot water. This move's power is not lowered in harsh sunlight but rather boosted by 50 percent.
The user summons a ruinous disaster. This cuts the target’s HP in half.
The user transforms and crashes to the ground, causing a massive prehistoric explosion. This move's power is boosted more than usual if it’s a supereffective hit.
The user races forward at ultrafast speeds, piercing its target with futuristic electricity. This move's power is boosted more than usual if it's a supereffective hit.
The user creates a substitute for itself using its own HP before switching places with a party Pokémon in waiting.
The user tells a chillingly bad joke before switching places with a party Pokémon in waiting. This summons a snowstorm lasting five turns.
The user tidies up and removes the effects of Spikes, Stealth Rock, Sticky Web, Toxic Spikes, and Substitute. This also boosts the user’s Attack and Speed stats.
The user summons a snowstorm lasting five turns. This boosts the Defense stats of Ice types.
The user attacks by pouncing on the target. This also lowers the target's Speed stat.
The user attacks suddenly as if leaping out from tall grass. The user's nimble footwork boosts its Speed stat.
The user attacks the target by showering it with water that's so cold it saps the target's power. This also lowers the target's Attack stat.
The user spins the pointed part of its body at high speed to pierce the target. This attack can hit a target using a move such as Protect or Detect.
The user shoots mystical beams from its eyes to inflict damage. The target is hit twice in a row.
The user converts its rage into energy to attack. The more times the user has been hit by attacks, the greater the move's power.
The user shoots its own armor out as blazing projectiles. This also lowers the user’s Defense and Sp. Def stats.
The user focuses its bitter feelings toward the world of the living into a slashing attack. The user's HP is restored by up to half the damage taken by the target.
The user discharges all the electricity from its body to perform a high-damage attack. After using this move, the user will no longer be Electric type.
The user swings its whole body around to attack with its huge hammer. This move can't be used twice in a row.
The user retaliates with much greater force against the opponent that last inflicted damage on it.
The user expels pressurized water to cut at the target like a blade. This move has a heightened chance of landing a critical hit.
The user unleashes the full brunt of its spirit from a full moon that shines as red as blood. This move can't be used twice in a row.
The user fires a blast of tea that it mixed. The user's HP is restored by up to half the damage taken by the target. This may also leave the target with a burn.
The user sets off an explosion of sticky candy syrup, which coats the target and causes the target's Speed stat to drop each turn for three turns.
The user strikes with an ivy-wrapped cudgel. This move's type changes depending on the mask worn by the user, and it has a heightened chance of landing a critical hit.
The user gathers electricity on the first turn, boosting its Sp. Atk stat, then fires a high-voltage shot on the next turn. The shot will be fired immediately in rain.
With the power of its crystals, the user bombards and eliminates the target. When used by Terapagos in its Stellar Form, this move damages all opposing Pokémon.
The user shoots a beam of light to inflict damage. Sometimes all the user's heads shoot beams in unison, doubling the move's power.
The user's intensely hot fur protects it from attacks and also burns any attacker that makes direct contact with it.
This move enables the user to attack first with a jolt of electricity. This move fails if the target is not readying an attack.
The user wields the light that has accumulated atop its head to cleave the target. This move hits even if the target protects itself.
The user attacks by launching particle blades at the target twice in a row. This attack never misses.
The target is crushed with an arm, a claw, or the like to inflict damage. The more HP the target has left, the greater the move's power.
The user raises its allies’ morale with a draconic cry so that their future attacks have a heightened chance of landing critical hits. This rouses Dragon types more.
The user attacks the target using its angelic voice. This also confuses the target if its stats have been boosted during the turn.
Spurred by desperation, the user attacks the target. This move's power is doubled if the user's previous move failed.
The user electrifies its body and drops onto the target to inflict damage. If this move misses, the user takes damage instead.
The user attacks the target with unpleasant sound waves. For two turns, the target is prevented from recovering HP through moves, Abilities, or held items.
The user reacts to the target's movement and strikes with the heel of its palm, making the target flinch. This move fails if the target is not readying a priority move.
The user pours toxins into the target by wrapping them in a toxic, corrosive chain. This may also leave the target badly poisoned.
